name: nebula-studio-ui
//: The Studio UI (chat-first authoring SPA). DEV: runs via its own vite dev server + a same-origin proxy to `wrangler dev` (see vite.config.ts + README.md). Deps mirror container/app (no new project deps) + @lumenize/nebula for the mesh client. A workspace member so @lumenize/* resolve. PROD serving (Workers Assets, Decision 3) is a later step.
